description: Known hard-negative categories from Bible v7 §6.2 (negation/number/date/increase-decrease/before-after/same-entity-different-conclusion/subject-object-reversal). Each case has high lexical overlap so it would pass the similarity threshold on wording alone; expectedGate names which contradiction gate (lib/check/similarity.ts detectContradictionReasons) must catch it. 'knownLimitation: true' cases are gaps the current heuristic gate does not catch (e.g. role reversal, which changes meaning without changing tokens, negation markers, or extracted quantities) — they are asserted to still MATCH so the test suite documents the gap instead of silently passing a false assumption.

cases.sentence: The application fee is refundable if rejected.
cases.candidateText: The application fee is not refundable if rejected.

cases.sentence: The Seoul Metro base fare is 1400 won for adults.
cases.candidateText: The Seoul Metro base fare is 1600 won for adults.

cases.sentence: The passport reissue fee is 53000 won.
cases.candidateText: The passport reissue fee is 38000 won.

cases.sentence: The move-in report rule changed in the year 2020.
cases.candidateText: The move-in report rule changed in the year 2023.

cases.sentence: Applications submitted before the year 2020 used the old fee schedule.
cases.candidateText: Applications submitted after the year 2023 used the old fee schedule.

cases.sentence: The base fare increased to 1400 won this year.
cases.candidateText: The base fare decreased to 1400 won this year.

cases.sentence: The Seoul Metro base fare requires a transit card and is 1400 won.
cases.candidateText: The Seoul Metro base fare does not require a transit card and is 1400 won.

cases.sentence: A guarantor is required for the visa applicant.
cases.candidateText: A visa applicant is required for the guarantor.
